message:
chore: add mobile capture E2E test and update gitignore

Adds a Playwright E2E test for capturing mobile viewport screenshots
and updates .gitignore to exclude debugging artifacts.

New Test (packages/web/e2e/repro.spec.ts):
- Mobile viewport test (375x667) for visual regression capture
- Attempts live site (phage-explorer.org) with fallback handling
- Saves screenshot to test-results/mobile-home.png for review

Gitignore Additions:
- test-results/ - Playwright screenshot and trace outputs
- inspect-ui.ts, audit-ui.ts - One-off debugging inspection scripts
  that use Playwright to check touch targets, font sizes, contrast,
  and layout overflow issues
- .beads/beads.left.* - Temporary bead tracking state files
- packages/web/public/phage.db - Generated SQLite database that is
  fetched at runtime from CDN, not checked into version control

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,8 +57,20 @@ Thumbs.db

 test-output/

 *.test-output
 
+# UI inspection/audit scripts (debugging tools, not production code)
+inspect-ui.ts
+audit-ui.ts
+packages/web/audit-ui.ts
+
+# Temporary beads tracking data
+.beads/beads.left.*
+
+# Generated database in web public (fetched at runtime, not checked in)
+packages/web/public/phage.db
+
 # OS files
 .DS_Store
 .AppleDouble
